extortion.description: Phoenix Environmental Laboratories specializes in high-quality analysis of soil, water, air, sediment, and solids, complying with EPA, state environmental protection agency, and health department requirements. The company serves a diverse clientele, including small businesses, large engineering firms, and state and federal agencies. They offer competitive pricing and standard turnaround times of 7 to 10 business days, as well as priority, expedited, and emergency response services. Phoenix strives to collaborate with consulting and municipal partners in an effort to create a cleaner and safer environment.
